programme.title: Mazes and Monsters
programme.desc: Four college students become immersed in fantasy role-playing games causing tragic results; based on Rona Jaffes book

programme.title: Lion of the Desert
programme.desc: Set during the reign of Mussolini this epic tale revolves around Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar Omar an Arab Muslim rebel takes on the Italian attack which is directed towards conquering Libya

programme.title: Conquest of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Following a North American pandemic from a space-borne disease that wiped out all dogs and cats in 1983 the government has become a series of Schutzstaffel-patterned police states that took chimpanzees gorillas and orangutans as pets before establishing a culture based on ape slave labor These events were foretold in 1973 as testimony by two chimpanzee scientists who came from the distant future Cornelius and Zira before they were killed Widely believed to be dead their baby was secretly raised by the circus owner Armando as a young horseback rider In 1991 now fully grown and named Caesar the ape is brought to one of the cities to distribute flyers for Armandos circus During their trip Armando advises Caesar not to speak in public for fear of his life

programme.title: TBH 124
programme.desc: TBH 124

programme.title: Petticoat Junction S05E13
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction S05E13

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: The Hooterville Express is under threat again from Homer Bedloe His latest attack involves part of the rail tracks being on Indian land

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Hooterville has a long standing record of being the first community to have their political votes submitted to the state This time they have competition from another community

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Billys mother has remarried She Billy and his new stepfather move into their new house on Mothers Day The house is in Springwood The stepfather has a difficult temper and Billy wants more attention from his mother As soon as they arrive they leave Billy alone since they are going on their honeymoon Then he meets his new neighbor the beautiful Barbara who convinces him to organize a party whose outcome will be fatal Meanwhile a radio psychologist finds herself in trouble when she gives bad advice to her listeners She is Barbaras mother and is obsessed with her job as a radio celebrity and needs to put her daughter first

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A former potential surgeon sets out to wreak revenge on the brother whose cruel practical joke prevented him from realizing his dream

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An unattractive and unlucky actor cant get a role because of his looks His agent and girlfriend leave him But he doesnt intend to give up - he wants the role of Hamlet

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: A photographer decides not to stop a woman from committing suicide in order to get some good pictures of the tragedy His new female assistant makes him face his lack of empathy

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: A nurse wants the husband of her patient for herself so she delves into black magic to get rid of her patient However her plan backfires

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick suspects a cover-up in the attempted rape of a police captains wife and her subsequent shooting of the attacker

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A dentist uses a cursed electric chair to seek revenge against those who wronged him

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale Molly and The 73 Crew must practice some trickery to keep Binghamton at bay while they arrange for an against-the-rules wedding for Christy and his fiancee - Lieutenant Gloria Winters

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Urulu puts a curse on Binghamton when Binghamton refuses to arrange for monetary compensation for damages inflicted on Urulus island by the Navys cannon boats

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While in town on pass Sgt Carter decides to play a joke on Gomer by setting him on a quest to get a kiss from The Dragon Lady but in order for it to work he will need Dukes help

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Its Survival Training for the platoon two-man teams must rough it for five days Thinking Gomer will bring down the platoons rating Sgt Carter takes him for his partner Gomers small-town backwoods upbringing turns out to be an asset

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Professor believes the castaways may be beginning to suffer from Island Madness so he convinces Ginger to use her psychic powers to convince them that a boat is coming to rescue them

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A crate containing a lion bound for a zoo washes up on the island But while the other castaways are scared for their lives the lion immediately makes a bond with Gilligan

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Luke is set up by a traveling show to take part in a boxing match Kate objects which leaves Grandpa to defend the McCoy family honor

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: George opens a gas station and he makes the mistake of hiring Amos

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Captain Grant and Lt Steiger set a match to a powder-keg when they abduct BJs best friend Bear BJ and the lady truckers wage war against SCAT just when Grant is trying to woo appropriations funding from an influential state senator

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Both Carol and Ed want Wilbur to hire a famous decorator to redo the house and stable in a Hawaiian Modern motif

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur bets an old college rival 5 bills that Ed can out-jump his horse He has second thoughts after he realizes that 5 bills equals 500

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Sergeant Schultz impersonates Klink in a scheme to get some of his men free from the Gestapo

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: To get an Italian officer to defect the Heroes use pizza to tempt him

programme.title: The Disappearance Thriller
programme.desc: Thriller about a contract killer whose wife has disappeared When he is hired by an international organization to carry out a shy or hit he suspects they are connected with her disappearance

programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadgets skiing holiday is interrupted when MAD try to rob a Swiss bank of its gold reserves

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby instructs Gadget to retrieve a powerful microcomputer from MAD that is capable of teleportation

programme.title: The Savage Bees
programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler

programme.title: Love Boat 118
programme.desc: Love Boat 118

programme.title: Solar Crisis
programme.desc: A huge Solar flare is predicted to fry Earth Astronauts must fly to the sun to drop a talking bomb Freddy at the right time so the flare will point somewhere else Giant IXL Corp CEO Teague thinks the flare wont happen and wants the mission to fail so he can buy the planet cheaply while the scare lasts

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: While trying to outfox Rosco Bo and Luke happen upon a race track where Cale Yarborough is secretly testing a new turbo supercharger for an upcoming race The Duke boys offer to help Cale keep the engine away from the dreaded Jethro brothers who have approached Boss and Rosco for help in obtaining the engine at all costs

programme.title: Hercules 222
programme.desc: Hercules 222

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: An old business partner of Augurs is hired by Daan to get information about the Resistance resulting in the death of many members Meanwhile Sandoval finds out he has a life threatening blood disorder

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Blackwood team consults with noted linguist Adrian Bouchard Cedric Smith to decipher the aliens transmissions

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Killer mist from the swamp attacks Houma putting residents in grave danger Arcane and Alec team up to to find an antidote while Abigail and Will hunt for a boy who may be lost in the mist Can they stop the mist before someone gets hurt

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Wills past comes back to haunt him not only in his dreams but here in his new home when a friend shows up who was involved in a robbery

programme.title: Space1999
programme.desc: While exploring an Earth-type world several Alphans including Commander Koenig and Dr Russel disappear after sighting a strange fog Shortly afterwards a race of primitive humans are encountered

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: The once friendly annual rodeo between the Barkley and Morton ranches has become a nasty win-at-all-costs event An ex-slave super cowboy raises the stakes when he agrees to compete for the Barkleys

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne comes upon a man who has just been shot Arrested by a few riders and on the way to Laramie a hidden benefactor frees him Their new friendship is shaken when he finds the real reason he saved him and who he really is

programme.title: Young 312
programme.desc: Young 312

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streers of San Francisco
programme.desc: The murder of a pregnant girl leads Stone and Keller to arrogant radio host Terry Vine who has a large female fanbase The dead girl claimed to be pregnant with Vines baby giving him a motive for murder and after her blackmailing roommate also turns up dead Keller is convinced Vine is the killer

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Rogosh is an operative for a country hostile to the United States When he strikes he typically leaves dozens if not hundreds of bodies in his wake Rogosh has been spotted in Los Angeles But he will not crack under normal interrogation methods Briggs comes up with an unusual plan The IMF stages an accident where pedestrian Rogosh is struck by a car When he awakes he appears to be in a prison in his home country -- three years later

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: fter work Joe Friday goes by a laundromat to buy cigarettes He interrupts a burglar stealing from the coin box and shots are fired The burglar dies and Friday is investigated by the shooting board to see if it is a justified shot

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man is forcing different young women to help him rob banks and Friday and Gannon have to find out who he is and stop him

programme.title: Bulletproof
programme.desc: A group of terrorists seize the Thunderblast top-secret super tank hiding it in Mexico The task of recovering it is entrusted to Frank McBain a former secret agent and current cop

programme.title: Wheels on Meals
programme.desc: Thomas and David who own a mobile restaurant save a thief Sylvia with the help of their detective friend Moby As a result they find themselves pitted against an evil gang

programme.desc: An expert in kenpo karate avenges his Koreatown friend slain by a mobster in Los Angeles

programme.title: The Slumber Party Massacre
programme.desc: With her parents out of town high school senior Trish decides to throw a slumber party but things go downhill when an escaped killer wielding a power drill is loose in the neighbourhood

programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents

programme.title: Sleepaway Camp
programme.desc: Bunks and showers are a mad stabbers beat at a summer camp strictly for teens

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Following Audrics signal the Lightning League enters the Pirates Guild zone commanded by the pirate queen Morgana an old love of Hercs The Pride is boarded robbed and Herc and Oon are taken prisoners Jayce Gillian and Flora follow them concealed by an invisible bubble Saw Boss is given Oon as his share of the loot but he recognizes him and insists upon having Jayce Morgana reluctantly attempts to force Herc to tell of Jayces whereabouts but then she changes sides and fights Saw Boss Jayce rescues Herc and Morgana and she gives up her pirating ways to fight Monster Minds

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger
